item.title: 👍Elizabeth Ford - Seattle Univ. School of Law

item.title: House approves Fosse’s Wage Recovery Act to strengthen enforcement and protect workers – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "House approves Fosse’s Wage Recovery Act to strengthen enforcement and protect workers – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.
